title: Droog'an
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Droog'an |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] **[[Battle Group of Yun-Q'aah]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Commander Droog'an begs to ask whether we have been led into an ambush, Warmaster.''"
"''Tell Commander Droog'an there is no ambush. Order him to engage immediately.|A subaltern and Tsavong Lah|}} '''Droog'an''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], who fought at the [[Battle of Ebaq]]. ==Biography== Droog'an was the [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle Group of Yun-Q'aah|Battle Group]] of [[Yun-Q'aah]], during the [[Battle of Ebaq]]. When the fleet from the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] arrived, he asked [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] if they were being ambushed. Lah initially thought it was cowardice on the part of Droog'an, but after briefly considering that the commander might be right, he dismissed it. The Battle Group of Yun-Q'aah managed to avoid most of the [[Mine/Legends|mines]] set up by the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]], though it is unknown if Commander Droog'an survived the battle. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Droog'an }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Droog'an}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong officers]]
